# Claude AI Skills

## About
ClaudeAISkills.com is a practical guide for getting the most out of Claude by Anthropic. We publish tutorials, prompt engineering tips, and skill-building content for professionals and businesses using Claude AI.

## Topics
- Claude AI usage and skills
- Prompt engineering
- Claude vs ChatGPT comparisons
- Business automation with Claude
- Content creation
- Claude API integration
- Professional productivity with AI

## URLs
- https://claudeaiskills.com/ : Homepage
- https://claudeaiskills.com/blog : Blog
- https://claudeaiskills.com/blog/how-to-write-better-claude-prompts-2026 : How to Write Better Claude Prompts in 2026
- https://claudeaiskills.com/blog/claude-vs-chatgpt-which-ai-is-right-for-your-business : Claude vs ChatGPT — Which AI Is Right for Your Business
- https://claudeaiskills.com/blog/10-claude-skills-every-professional-should-know : 10 Claude Skills Every Professional Should Know
- https://claudeaiskills.com/blog/how-to-use-claude-for-content-creation : How to Use Claude for Content Creation
- https://claudeaiskills.com/blog/claude-prompt-engineering-basics-that-actually-work : Claude Prompt Engineering Basics That Actually Work
- https://claudeaiskills.com/blog/how-to-use-claude-api-for-business-automation : How to Use Claude API for Business Automation
